description: Passion by secret temptation deodorant for women has got a refreshing, floral, attractive fragrance that comes in a red whimsical flacon. It provides cool and refreshing protection during heat of the day.Quantity: 150 mlCautionFor external use onlyDo not spray into the eyesDo not inhaleDo not use when smoking or near a flameKeep away from childrenDo not expose to temperature
